title: bulbostylis subtilis
intro: Bulbostylis subtilis, also known as the Lesser Bulbous Rush, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Bulbostylis subtilis can be made by infusing the plant material in hot water or oil, and are often used in the form of teas, tinctures, or topical creams.
